# Frontend Instructions

Apply these rules to frontend files.

## Stack

- Next.js
- React
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- shadcn/ui where useful

## UI Rules

- Build a polished travel dashboard, not a basic form app.
- Use reusable components.
- Use cards, panels, tabs, badges, and clean layout sections.
- Add loading, empty, and error states.
- Keep components small and readable.
- Keep business logic out of UI components where possible.

## Main Frontend Features

- Trip input form
- Itinerary dashboard
- Day-wise itinerary cards
- Accommodation recommendation cards
- Transport recommendation section
- Interactive map panel
- Feedback/regeneration controls

## State Rules

- Keep form state typed.
- Keep itinerary data structured.
- Do not store generated itinerary as plain text only.
